examples: A tripod will be useful to align and steady the camera.
The beast held tightly on the tripod and pressed it into my side.
I held my camera tripod in both hands to form a barrier as the bear rushed into me.
The iOgrapher line uses 37 mm lenses. it can attach any standard size tripod.
An optional tripod bracket is available to securely stabilize the camera system when longer lenses are attached.
